Name: No finite-memory correction baseline
Role: Tests whether K2 adds value beyond no-memory response
ExpectedFailureMode: Fails only if residual pattern requires late-depth response
RequiredComparison: Compare covariance score and point residuals

Name: Smooth polynomial response control
Role: Tests whether K2 is just generic flexibility
ExpectedFailureMode: Can mimic broad trends without locked finite-memory structure
RequiredComparison: Compare equal-complexity benchmark score and cross-validation

Name: Backreaction-only diagnostic control
Role: Tests whether averaging effects explain the envelope without finite memory
ExpectedFailureMode: May explain BAO and SN+BAO shifts without K2

Name: Optical-propagation control
Role: Tests whether light-path clumpiness explains the response
ExpectedFailureMode: May match optical-distance shifts without projection memory
RequiredComparison: Compare on BAO and SN+BAO diagnostic grids

Name: Reconstruction artifact control
Role: Tests whether the signal is pipeline or degree-family dependent
ExpectedFailureMode: Explains sign-unstable points as reconstruction sensitivity

Name: Sign-randomized control
Role: Tests whether sign agreement is accidental

Name: Coordinate remap control
ExpectedFailureMode: Explains compatibility through post-hoc depth mapping
RequiredComparison: Compare locked mappings side by side
